expression: (() => { const t = document.querySelector('title')?.textContent || ''; if (t.includes('Just a moment') || t.includes('Cloudflare')) throw new Error('cloudflare-challenge'); const proIndicator = document.body.innerText.includes('Pro') || document.body.innerText.includes('Deep Research'); return { title: t, has_pro_indicator: proIndicator, login_required: document.body.innerText.includes('Sign in') }; })()

(() => { const mode = '__MODE__'; if (mode === 'pro' || mode === 'deep') { const desired = mode === 'pro' ? 'Pro Search' : 'Deep Research'; const trigger = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find(b => /Search Mode|Mode|Auto/i.test(b.getAttribute('aria-label') || b.textContent || '')); if (trigger) { trigger.click(); return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(() => { const opt = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('div,button,[role="menuitem"]')).find(el => (el.textContent || '').trim() === desired); if (opt) opt.click(); resolve({ mode_set: !!opt, target: desired }); }, 500)); } } return { mode_set: false, target: 'auto' }; })()

(() => { const ta = document.querySelector('textarea'); if (!ta) return { submitted: false, why: 'no-textarea' }; const submitBtn = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find(b => /Submit|Send/i.test(b.getAttribute('aria-label') || '')); if (submitBtn) { submitBtn.click(); return { submitted: true, via: 'button' }; } const ev = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', code: 'Enter', bubbles: true }); ta.dispatchEvent(ev); return { submitted: true, via: 'enter-keydown' }; })()

(async () => { const sleep = ms => new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, ms)); const isStable = () => !document.body.innerText.includes('Searching') && !document.body.innerText.includes('Generating') && !document.querySelector('[class*="animate-pulse"]'); for (let i = 0; i < 60; i++) { if (isStable()) break; await sleep(2000); } const proseEl = document.querySelector('[class*="prose"]') || document.querySelector('article') || document.querySelector('[class*="answer"]'); const answerText = proseEl ? (proseEl.innerText || '').trim() : ''; const links = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('a')).filter(a => a.href && a.href.startsWith('http') && !a.href.includes('perplexity.ai')); const seen = new Set(); const sources = []; for (const a of links) { const u = a.href.split('#')[0]; if (seen.has(u)) continue; seen.add(u); const title = (a.getAttribute('title') || a.textContent || '').trim().slice(0, 200); if (!title) continue; sources.push({ title, url: u }); if (sources.length >= 25) break; } return { answer_text: answerText, sources, final_url: location.href, stable: isStable() }; })()
